descriptionEn:
Aqua Beach Bar is a relaxed and well-organised venue on Agios Mamas Beach, close to Nea Potidea, ideal for families, couples and groups wishing to spend a peaceful day beside the sea. Comfortable sunbeds, generous space and a friendly atmosphere are complemented by coffee, cold drinks, cocktails and beach-friendly food suitable for lunch or a light snack. Visitors frequently praise the welcoming staff, prompt service, enjoyable food and good value.

The water is shallow, with a mostly sandy seabed after the first section, making the area particularly suitable for families with children. A few stones may be present at the sea entrance, so water shoes can provide additional comfort. A shower and changing area are available, while a water park is located next to the beach bar.

Current published hours are approximately 9:00 AMвҖ“9:00 PM daily, with free parking available nearby. At weekends and during busy days in July and August, arriving between 9:00 and 10:00 AM or booking ahead provides a better choice of beach positions. For reservations or additional information, please complete the form in the app.
descriptionRo:
Aqua Beach Bar este un loc relaxat Иҷi bine organizat pe plaja Agios Mamas, aproape de Nea Potidea, potrivit pentru familii, cupluri Иҷi grupuri care vor sДғ petreacДғ o zi liniИҷtitДғ lГўngДғ mare. Иҳezlongurile confortabile, spaИӣiul generos Иҷi atmosfera prietenoasДғ sunt completate de cafea, bДғuturi reci, cocktailuri Иҷi preparate potrivite pentru prГўnz sau o gustare pe plajДғ. Vizitatorii apreciazДғ frecvent personalul amabil, servirea promptДғ, mГўncarea gustoasДғ Иҷi raportul bun dintre calitate Иҷi preИӣ.

Apa este puИӣin adГўncДғ Иҷi fundul mДғrii devine predominant nisipos dupДғ prima porИӣiune, ceea ce face zona potrivitДғ Иҷi pentru familiile cu copii. La intrarea Г®n apДғ pot exista cГўteva pietre, astfel cДғ Г®ncДғlИӣДғmintea pentru apДғ poate oferi un plus de confort. Sunt disponibile duИҷ Иҷi spaИӣiu pentru schimbarea hainelor, iar lГўngДғ beach bar se aflДғ Иҷi un parc acvatic.

Programul publicat este zilnic, aproximativ Г®ntre 09:00 Иҷi 21:00, iar parcarea gratuitДғ este disponibilДғ Г®n apropiere. Pentru weekenduri Иҷi zilele aglomerate din iulie Иҷi august, sosirea Г®ntre 09:00 Иҷi 10:00 sau rezervarea din timp oferДғ o alegere mai bunДғ a locurilor pe plajДғ. Pentru rezervДғri sau informaИӣii suplimentare, completaИӣi formularul din aplicaИӣie
